name: Neural Network
description: Computing system inspired by biological neural networks

name: Activation Function
description: Function that determines neuron output (ReLU, Sigmoid, etc.)

name: CSS Grid
description: Two-dimensional CSS layout system

name: Flexbox
description: One-dimensional CSS layout model

name: DataFrame
description: 2D labeled data structure in Pandas

name: Vectorization
description: Performing operations on entire arrays instead of loops

name: Vector
description: Ordered array of numbers representing magnitude and direction

name: Matrix
description: Rectangular array of numbers used for linear transformations

name: Spaced Repetition
description: Learning technique using increasing review intervals

name: Forgetting Curve
description: Exponential decay of memory over time without reinforcement

name: Self-Attention
description: Mechanism allowing each position to attend to all others

name: Transformer
description: Architecture based on self-attention replacing RNNs

name: React Hooks
description: Functions to use state and lifecycle in React function components

name: Component State
description: Local state managed within a React component

name: Bayes Theorem
description: Formula for updating probabilities based on new evidence

name: Prior Probability
description: Initial belief before observing data

name: Graph
description: Mathematical structure of vertices and edges modeling relationships

name: Graph Traversal
description: Algorithms for visiting nodes: BFS and DFS

name: Working Memory
description: Cognitive system for temporarily holding and manipulating information

name: Cognitive Load
description: Total mental effort used in working memory

name: Convolutional Neural Network
description: Neural network using convolutional layers to detect spatial patterns

name: Word Embedding
description: Dense vector representation of words capturing semantic meaning

name: TypeScript Types
description: Static type annotations that add compile-time type safety to JavaScript

name: REST API
description: Architectural style using HTTP methods for stateless client-server communication

name: Feature Engineering
description: Process of creating and selecting input variables to improve model performance

name: A/B Testing
description: Controlled experiment comparing two variants to determine which performs better

name: Derivative
description: Rate of change of a function with respect to a variable

name: Information Entropy
description: Measure of uncertainty or surprise in a probability distribution

name: Retrieval Practice
description: Learning strategy of actively recalling information to strengthen memory

name: Interleaving
description: Study technique of mixing different topics to improve discrimination and retention
